description: An aerial photograph depicts a large naval shipyard and dry dock complex located on a calm, blue-green body of water, likely a bay or harbour, under clear sky conditions. In the midground, the dry dock facility features multiple basins, several of which are empty while others contain vessels. A prominent tan-coloured gantry crane with a long boom stands centrally, flanked by several blue-framed gantry cranes. A large aircraft carrier is visibly docked on the far right side of the complex, adjacent to multiple blue cranes. To the left-centre, a grey naval vessel, possibly a frigate or destroyer, with a distinctive white spherical radar dome, is situated within one of the dry docks. Various industrial buildings and infrastructure are scattered around the dock area. In the foreground, the edge of a city or town is visible, with multi-story buildings featuring terracotta roofs and a parking lot. In the background, numerous small boats and ships traverse the open water, leaving white wakes.
